CREATE SEQUENCE test_sequence START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1;
SELECT sequence_next('test_sequence') AS next_value_1, sequence_next('test_sequence') AS next_value_2;
CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, sequence_value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, sequence_value) VALUES (1, sequence_next('test_sequence'));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, sequence_value) VALUES (2, sequence_next('test_sequence'));
SELECT t.id, t.sequence_value FROM test_table t WHERE t.sequence_value = sequence_next('test_sequence');
INSERT INTO another_table (value) SELECT sequence_next('test_sequence') FROM test_table;
CREATE VIEW sequence_view AS SELECT sequence_next('test_sequence') AS view_value;
WITH seq AS (SELECT sequence_next('test_sequence') AS new_seq) SELECT new_seq FROM seq;
INSERT INTO temp_table (val) SELECT sequence_next('test_sequence') UNION SELECT sequence_next('test_sequence');
SELECT MAX(val) FROM temp_table WHERE val = sequence_next('test_sequence');
